query: ok let's just go with sqlite for now, redis is overkill for a single-node deploy
decision: every crate gets its own thiserror enum, anyhow only at the cli edge
I'm settled — adopt FTS5 instead of building a custom inverted index. Capture that decision.
after a lot of back and forth we're choosing rmcp 0.16 over the older mcp-rs crate, mostly because rmcp's stdio transport is cleaner. record this
going with bundled SQLite (rusqlite features = ["bundled"]) over the system one — too much version drift across mac/linux otherwise
yeah let's commit to ULIDs for memory ids. mem_<ULID>, proj_<slug-or-hash>, evt_<ULID>
we'll use tokio only in vestige-mcp where the transport demands it, the rest stays sync. importance high
log the recall scores at debug — actually wait, that's not a decision, that's just a TODO
I prefer 4-space indentation in this project, please always use that
TBD whether we want a daemon mode in v0.5. leaving it open for now
have we already decided on an embedding provider? search memory before I commit to fastembed
just realised cargo test --workspace re-runs FTS triggers in the tmpdir tests, good to know
forget mem_01H8XYZABC, that decision was reversed
